common.weeklyContract.contractHtml:
1. Contracting parties & subject matter

This contract governs participation in the weekly support training of Dortmunder Fußballschule (DFS) for the child specified in the form.

2. Training times, holidays & cancellations

Training generally takes place at the times stated in the contract. During school holidays and on public holidays, training may be cancelled or combined. DFS will inform participants of changes in due time. There is no entitlement to individual training dates if cancellations occur due to force majeure, pitch closures or official orders.

3. Obligations of parents / participants

  • Punctual arrival, suitable sports equipment and sufficient drinks are required.
  • Any health restrictions must be communicated before training starts.
  • The instructions of the coaches must be followed (safety/order).

4. DFS services

DFS provides training sessions in accordance with the program. Coaches may change for organizational reasons. Content may be adjusted to ensure quality and safety.

5. Withdrawal / cancellation / termination

Withdrawal: The contract may be withdrawn within 14 days after conclusion (storno). From the 15th day onward, termination takes place according to the agreed notice periods. Cancellations may be made in text form.

6. Liability

DFS is liable for intent and gross negligence. In cases of slight negligence, liability only applies in the event of a breach of essential contractual obligations and is limited to the typical foreseeable damage. No liability is assumed for personal belongings.

7. Photo/video (optional)

If selected, photos/videos may be used as part of public relations work. This is voluntary and may be revoked for the future.

8. Data protection

Personal data is processed for the performance of the contract. Further details can be found in the privacy notice.

9. Final provisions

If individual provisions are invalid, the remainder of the contract shall remain valid. German law applies.
